## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` and `ruff format --check src tests` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] `npm --prefix frontend run build` passes (if the board changed)
- [ ] Touched `src/tiles_ai/contracts/`? Updated `SPEC.md` and called it out below
- [ ] New tile/connector? It loads (`tiles list`) and has a test
